    {
      "property_id": "PROP-0021",
      "property": {
        "id": "PROP-0021",
        "text": "compute_subnet_for_data_column_sidecar must use DATA_COLUMN_SIDECAR_SUBNET_COUNT == 128 as the modulus. The subnet ID must equal column_index % 128, and the result must be in range [0, 128).",
        "type": "invariant",
        "source_assumption_id": null,
        "source_invariant_id": "p2p:SG-005:INV-001",

        "severity": "MEDIUM",
        "severity_justification": "Out-of-range subnet IDs could cause subscription failures or messages being published to non-existent subnets.",
        "bug_bounty_eligible": true,

      },
      "source_file": "outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W4B13_1770297426.json"
    },
    {
